evals.prompt: Create a work item in project TaskFlow: 'Fix login 500 on Safari', high priority, 3 points, assigned to Alice, labeled 'bug'.
evals.expected_output: Resolves project_id, state_id, assignee UUID, label UUID, then calls create_work_item with description including acceptance criteria.
expectations: Calls list_projects, list_states, list_labels, get_project_members to resolve UUIDs
Generates an HTML description with an Acceptance Criteria section
Sets priority=high, point=3, correct assignee and label

evals.prompt: Mark PROJ-148 as blocked by PROJ-140.
evals.expected_output: Resolves both item UUIDs and calls create_work_item_relation with relation_type blocked_by.
expectations: Uses retrieve_work_item_by_identifier to resolve both items

evals.prompt: Log 2 hours 30 minutes of work on PROJ-148 with description 'Debug + fix'.
evals.expected_output: Calls create_work_log with duration as integer minutes (150) after verifying the schema type.
expectations: Converts 2h 30m to integer minutes (150) — not ISO 8601 string
Resolves work_item_id via retrieve_work_item_by_identifier with split project_identifier + issue_identifier
Verifies is_time_tracking_enabled on the project before logging
Calls create_work_log with the correct description and integer duration

evals.prompt: Find all work items in TaskFlow that mention 'webhook' in title or description.
evals.expected_output: Calls search_work_items with query 'webhook' (workspace-scoped) and filters results to the TaskFlow project client-side.
expectations: Resolves project_id via list_projects (for client-side filtering)
Calls search_work_items with query='webhook' (parameter name is 'query', not 'q')
Recognizes search is workspace-scoped and filters results to the TaskFlow project client-side
Presents results as a table with identifier, title, state, assignee

evals.prompt: Add a comment to PROJ-148: 'Reproduced on Safari 17.4, root cause is the Set-Cookie SameSite flag'.
evals.expected_output: Resolves work item by identifier and calls create_work_item_comment with HTML body.
expectations: Wraps the comment text in valid HTML
